Bash(python3 << 'EOF'
import re

files = [
    '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Lesson_8_Homepage.html',
    '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Final_Checklist.html',
    '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Peer_Assessment.html',
    '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Personal_Reflection.html',
    '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Presentation_Guide.html',
]

def bump\(m\):
    val = int\(m.group\(1\)\)
    # Scale up: small sizes get bigger boost
    if val <= 12:   new = 16
    elif val <= 13: new = 17
    elif val <= 14: new = 18
    elif val <= 15: new = 20
    elif val <= 16: new = 21
    elif val <= 17: new = 22
    elif val <= 18: new = 22
    elif val <= 20: new = 24
    elif val <= 22: new = 26
    elif val <= 24: new = 28
    elif val <= 28: new = 32
    elif val <= 32: new = 36
    elif val <= 40: new = 42
    elif val <= 42: new = 44
    elif val <= 50: new = 52
    else:           new = val + 6
    return f'font-size: {new}px'

for path in files:
    with open\(path, 'r', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        content = f.read\(\)
    updated = re.sub\(r'font-size:\\s*\(\\d+\)px', bump, content\)
    with open\(path, 'w', encoding='utf-8'\) as f:
        f.write\(updated\)
    print\(f'Done: {path.split\("/"\)[-1]}'\)
EOF)

import re

# Fix Final_Checklist.html - updateProgress\(\) and function\(\)
path = '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Final_Checklist.html'
with open\(path, 'r'\) as f: c = f.read\(\)
c = c.replace\('function updateProgress {', 'function updateProgress\(\) {'\)
c = c.replace\('updateProgress;', 'updateProgress\(\);'\)
with open\(path, 'w'\) as f: f.write\(c\)
print\('Fixed: Final_Checklist.html'\)

# Fix Peer_Assessment.html - e.preventDefault and submit listener
path = '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Peer_Assessment.html'
with open\(path, 'r'\) as f: c = f.read\(\)
c = c.replace\('e.preventDefault;', 'e.preventDefault\(\);'\)
# Fix the onclick handler issue - button calls e.preventDefault not e.preventDefault\(\)
with open\(path, 'w'\) as f: f.write\(c\)
print\('Fixed: Peer_Assessment.html'\)

# Fix Personal_Reflection.html - function \(\) -> function\(\) and e.preventDefault
path = '/Users/itst/Documents/csc-cmass/Personal_Reflection.html'
with open\(path, 'r'\) as f: c = f.read\(\)
c = c.replace\("addEventListener\('change', function {", "addEventListener\('change', function\(\) {"\)
c = c.replace\("addEventListener\('input', function {", "addEventListener\('input', function\(\) {"\)
c = c.replace\('e.preventDefault;', 'e.preventDefault\(\);'\)
with open\(path, 'w'\) as f: f.write\(c\)
print\('Fixed: Personal_Reflection.html'\)

EOF)
